description: CompositionWhite high collar jacket made of PES, with a broad hood, zipper front placket, has adidas patent 3-Stripes running down the full sleeves and welt pockets on the sidesFittingRegularWash careonly hand wash gentlyDo not machine washWash with like coloursWash and iron inside outDo not use fabric softenerUse mild detergent onlyDo not iron on motif/print/trims/logoWith this Climalite enabled jacket, you can conveniently ignore the heat and keep your focus right where it needs to be: on the finish line. A combination of carefully selected fabrics, this jacket keeps your body dry by drawing sweat away from your body helping you to perform at your peak in even the most heated competition. Wear it with a crew or round neck tee and denims with sneakers for the maximum stylish look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
